creator: shigeri@m10.alpha-net.ne.jp
text:
version up and delete patch-ae

Fix: delete patch-ae



---
shigeri (Shigetoshi Inohana) <shigeri@m10.alpha-net.ne.jp>
http://www.alpha-net.ne.jp/users2/shigeri/--2i0fRCOlzUecc4Bw4hVyGNiIIJdCRsnXeGizWxExUNCoHRnX
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"

diff -ruN sylpheed.old/Makefile sylpheed/Makefile
--- sylpheed.old/Makefile       Wed May  9 01:59:12 2001
+++ sylpheed/Makefile   Fri Jul 13 00:44:56 2001
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=      sylpheed
-PORTVERSION=   0.4.66
+PORTVERSION=   0.5.0
 CATEGORIES=    mail ipv6
 MASTER_SITES=  http://sylpheed.good-day.net/sylpheed/
 
@@ -15,7 +15,7 @@
 USE_BZIP2=     yes
 USE_X_PREFIX=  yes
 USE_IMLIB=     yes
-USE_LIBTOOL=   yes
+GNU_CONFIGURE= yes
 CONFIGURE_ENV= CPPFLAGS="-I${LOCALBASE}/include" \
                LIBS="-L${LOCALBASE}/lib"
 CONFIGURE_ARGS=        --disable-compface --disable-gdk-pixbuf --enable-ipv6
 
diff -ruN sylpheed.old/distinfo sylpheed/distinfo
--- sylpheed.old/distinfo       Wed May  9 02:03:07 2001
+++ sylpheed/distinfo   Sat Jul  7 01:53:17 2001
@@ -1 +1 @@
-MD5 (sylpheed-0.4.66.tar.bz2) = dd997ca324a77d08de834cf81a66da0e
+MD5 (sylpheed-0.5.0.tar.bz2) = 5fab4e67b8a9f440c83ec9fcd22a1d24
